page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This tool is made to remove tips (short dead ends) from a compacted de Bruijn graph and more generally to remove sequencing errors. Used in Bcool a short read corrector
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Fast and lightweight software to trim adapters and low quality regions in reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Fast and lightweight software to trim adapters and low quality regions in reads.
